title: coleus laetus
intro: Coleus laetus is a plant species that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to tropical Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Coleus laetus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and serve as an antiseptic. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or poultices, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
